name: My Credit Repair Specialists
description_short: Texas-based credit repair company offering unlimited disputes with all three major credit bureaus, personalized credit plans, and financial education to help clients improve credit scores.
description_long:
My Credit Repair Specialists (operating as Advanced Financial Services Group/AFSG) is a credit repair company based in Austin, Texas. According to their website, they are state-registered and bonded, with several years of experience in the credit restoration industry. The company positions itself as offering legitimate, cost-effective credit repair services distinct from typical competitors in the space.

The company's core services include credit report and score analysis, unlimited disputes sent to all three major credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion), personalized credit repair plans, document collection and processing, and monthly progress reports. Clients receive access to a 24/7 online portal to track progress and communicate with their assigned credit specialist. The company also provides financial education via email to help clients understand credit score calculations and avoid repeating negative credit patterns.

Key differentiators claimed by the company include unlimited disputing (rather than limited dispute cycles), a dedicated customer support team available via email, phone, and text, and pricing positioned as affordable ($99/month for individuals, $79/month for spouses). They emphasize results-oriented service with client testimonials citing score improvements ranging from 518 to 746 in 60 days, and 540 to 782 in approximately 3 months.

The main caveat is that credit repair results depend heavily on the validity of disputed items and individual credit situations. While the website provides specific client testimonials, the rapid improvement timelines (30-60 days) may not be representative for all clients. Additionally, typical credit repair services cannot remove legitimate negative items, only dispute inaccurate or unverifiable ones. Pricing information on the website appears incomplete, with the spouse rate description cut off mid-text.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Unlimited disputes to all three major credit bureaus (not limited to set cycles)
State-registered and bonded in Texas with specified years of industry experience
24/7 online client portal for real-time progress tracking and specialist communication
Relatively affordable pricing at $99/month (individual) and $79/month (spouse rate)
Includes personalized credit repair plan specific to each client's financial situation
Provides financial education content to help clients understand credit mechanics long-term
Multiple contact channels available (email, phone, text support)
cons: Website contains incomplete pricing information (spouse rate description is cut off)
Client testimonials showing 30-60 day dramatic improvements (518→746, 540→782) may not be typical or representative
No information provided about fees, cancellation policies, or contract terms beyond monthly pricing
Website uses multiple company names (AFSG, Advanced Financial Services, My Credit Repair Specialists) creating potential confusion about entity structure
No mention of FCRA compliance certifications or specific dispute methodology
best_for: Texas residents with multiple negative items on credit reports seeking systematic dispute assistance
Consumers wanting ongoing support and education to prevent returning to poor credit patterns
Couples looking for household credit repair where both spouses need services at reduced rate
diagnosis: Best suited for Texas residents seeking comprehensive credit repair with ongoing support and education, particularly those with multiple disputed items and willingness to pay monthly fees. Main caveat: results depend entirely on the validity of items being disputed; the company cannot remove accurate negative items, and the rapid improvement timelines advertised may not reflect typical client experiences.
services: Unlimited disputes to Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion
Email, phone, and text customer support
Credit and financial education via email
Ongoing credit specialist assignment and communication
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8650 Spicewood Springs Rd ste 145-117, Austin, TX 78759
